nasb.text: You shall make on the breastpiece two rings of gold, and shall put the two rings on the two ends of the breastpiece.

esv.text: And you shall make for the breastpiece two rings of gold, and put the two rings on the two edges of the breastpiece.

cnv.text: 你要在胸牌上做兩個金環，把這兩個金環安在胸牌的兩端之上。

ccb.text: 造两个金环安在胸牌两端，
